004 * this work for additional information regarding copyright ownership.

006 * "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with the

008 *

012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,

015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.http.header;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.Shorts.*;
020
021import java.util.*;
022import java.util.function.*;
023
024import org.apache.juneau.commons.http.*;
025
026/**
027 * Base type for headers whose value is a single {@link MediaType} (e.g. {@code Content-Type}).
028 *
029 * <p>
030 * <b>Beta — API subject to change:</b> This type is part of the next-generation REST client and HTTP stack
031 * ({@code org.apache.juneau.marshall.ng.*}).
032 *
033 * @since 9.2.1
034 */
035@SuppressWarnings({
036   "java:S2160", // equals() on HttpHeaderBean uses name + getValue(); typed state is reflected in getValue()
037   "unchecked" // Supplier<?> branches cast to typed suppliers after lazy-mode check
038})
039public class HttpMediaTypeHeader extends HttpHeaderBean {
040
041   public static final int LAZY_WIRE_STRING = 0;
042   public static final int LAZY_MEDIA_TYPE = 1;
043
044   private final MediaType cachedForStringOrDirect;
045   private final Supplier<?> lazySupplier;
046   private final int lazyMode;
047
048   protected HttpMediaTypeHeader(String name, String value) {
049      super(name, value);
050      this.cachedForStringOrDirect = parseMediaType(value);
051      this.lazySupplier = null;
052      this.lazyMode = -1;
053   }
054
055   protected HttpMediaTypeHeader(String name, MediaType value) {
056      super(name, value == null ? null : value.toString());
057      this.cachedForStringOrDirect = value;
058      this.lazySupplier = null;
059      this.lazyMode = -1;
060   }
061
062   protected HttpMediaTypeHeader(String name, Supplier<?> supplier, int lazyMode) {
063      super(name, lazyMode == LAZY_WIRE_STRING
064         ? ((Supplier<String>) supplier)::get
065         : () -> {
066            var m = ((Supplier<MediaType>) supplier).get();
067            if (m == null)
068               return null;
069            return m.toString();
070         });
071      this.cachedForStringOrDirect = null;
072      this.lazySupplier = supplier;
073      this.lazyMode = lazyMode;
074   }
075
076   public Optional<MediaType> asMediaType() {
077      return o(toMediaType());
078   }
079
080   public String getParameter(String name) {
081      return orElse(MediaType.EMPTY).getParameter(name);
082   }
083
084   public List<NameValuePair> getParameters() {
085      return orElse(MediaType.EMPTY).getParameters();
086   }
087
088   public final String getSubType() {
089      return orElse(MediaType.EMPTY).getSubType();
090   }
091
092   public final List<String> getSubTypes() {
093      return orElse(MediaType.EMPTY).getSubTypes();
094   }
095
096   public final String getType() {
097      return orElse(MediaType.EMPTY).getType();
098   }
099
100   public final boolean hasSubType(String value) {
101      return orElse(MediaType.EMPTY).hasSubType(value);
102   }
103
104   public final boolean isMetaSubtype() {
105      return orElse(MediaType.EMPTY).isMetaSubtype();
106   }
107
108   public int match(List<MediaType> mediaTypes) {
109      var matchQuant = 0;
110      var matchIndex = -1;
111      for (var i = 0; i < mediaTypes.size(); i++) {
112         var mt = mediaTypes.get(i);
113         var matchQuant2 = mt.match(orElse(MediaType.EMPTY), true);
114         if (matchQuant2 > matchQuant) {
115            matchQuant = matchQuant2;
116            matchIndex = i;
117         }
118      }
119      return matchIndex;
120   }
121
122   public final int match(MediaType o, boolean allowExtraSubTypes) {
123      return orElse(MediaType.EMPTY).match(o, allowExtraSubTypes);
124   }
125
126   public MediaType orElse(MediaType other) {
127      var x = toMediaType();
128      return nn(x) ? x : other;
129   }
130
131   public MediaType toMediaType() {
132      if (lazyMode == LAZY_MEDIA_TYPE)
133         return ((Supplier<MediaType>) lazySupplier).get();
134      if (cachedForStringOrDirect != null)
135         return cachedForStringOrDirect;
136      return parseMediaType(super.getValue());
137   }
138
139   private static MediaType parseMediaType(String value) {
140      if (!nn(value))
141         return null;
142      var v = value;
143      var i = v.indexOf(',');
144      if (i != -1)
145         v = v.substring(i + 1);
146      return MediaType.of(v);
147   }
148}
